definition: Area distribution and mapped presence of an ecosystem type
example_indicators: ecosystem area habitat distribution land cover persistence
primary_risk: Mapped presence mistaken for ecological health

definition: Ecological state relative to reference or benchmark
example_indicators: biotic condition water quality habitat score vegetation health
canopy layers patch structure connectivity habitat complexity
productivity nutrient cycling hydrological function decomposition carbon flux

definition: Synthetic coherence of biotic structural and functional character
example_indicators: native composition process continuity connectivity reference similarity

definition: Capacity to absorb recover adapt or reorganize after disturbance
example_indicators: recovery rate threshold distance disturbance memory adaptive capacity

definition: Frequency intensity extent duration and type of ecological disturbance
example_indicators: fire flood drought pollution invasion fragmentation

definition: Observed pathway after disturbance or restoration
example_indicators: condition improvement reference gap closure function return composition recovery
primary_risk: Visible recovery mistaken for restored integrity
